import io
import string

fn main() -> Unit
  match io.read_line()
  when Some(line)
    let n = string.len(line)
    mut result = ""
    mut i = 0
    while i < n
      match string.byte_at(line, i)
      when Some(b)
        mut out = b
        if b >= 97 and b <= 122
          out = ((b - 97 + 13) % 26) + 97
        else if b >= 65 and b <= 90
          out = ((b - 65 + 13) % 26) + 65
        end
        result = "#{result}#{string.from_byte(out)}"
      when None
        result = result
      end
      i = i + 1
    end
    println(result)
  when None
    println("")
  end
end
